post.description: Get a Wise quote for a withdrawal

get.description: Get the user's withdrawal account emails (Wise and Binance)

put.description:
Verify OTP and update the user's withdrawal account emails (Wise and/or Binance).
Must call POST /withdrawals/accounts/request-update first to receive an OTP.

post.description:
Request an OTP to update withdrawal account emails.
Sends a 6-digit verification code to the user's registered email.
The code is valid for 10 minutes.

Submit a withdrawal request.

Atomically deducts `amount` from the authenticated user's wallet and
creates a Transaction record with status `SUBMITTED`. The withdrawal
will be reviewed and processed by an admin or an automated job.
